name: ScreenMark
subtitle: Present, annotate & record
promotionalText: Guide attention with live zoom, freeze frame, whiteboard, and recording from your menu bar.
description: ScreenMark is a local-first presentation overlay for macOS. Use live zoom, draw and text tools, freeze frame, whiteboard mode, timers, snapshots, and recording without leaving the app you are presenting. The free tier covers the essentials, while ScreenMark Pro adds recording, live zoom, advanced annotation tools, custom shortcuts, and expanded export options.
